title: Armor HUD Numbers
description: A tiny add-on for uku's Armor HUD that displays numerical durability above the armor slot.
body:
# Archival Notice

As of v0.9.2, the core functionality of this mod is included in uku's Armor HUD.

# Armor HUD Numbers

A tiny add-on for [uku's Armor HUD](https://modrinth.com/project/wF189hn9) that displays numerical durability above the
armor slot.

The numbers will only be shown if the uku's Armor HUD config value "Show Warning" is set to "ON".

A keybind is provided to toggle the warning (and by extension, the numbers) separately from the HUD.
